greeting.line: Every big win has a story. Some are even true. Buy me a chip and I'll tell one.
greeting.line_friendly: Ah — a fellow keeper of records. Sit. The files like you.
greeting.line_hostile: Those binders are sealed. Walk away.

options.text: What gaps are you not allowed to fill?

sealed.line: Between file 300 and file 700 there is nothing. I did not lose those files. I was never given them.

options.text: I'll look for what filled the gap.

gaps.line: Draw your own conclusions — I'm not allowed to. But if you visit Neon Alley with open eyes, the Current writes in the margins.
